common.metaDescription: Manage and link technical PDF plans

auth.loginDescription: Sign in with your email address
auth.resetPasswordDescription: We'll send you a link via email
auth.confirmEmailSent: We've sent you a confirmation email. Please click the link in the email to activate your account.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account with this email exists, you'll receive an email with a password reset link shortly.

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailTaken: This email address is already taken.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed yet. Please check your inbox and click the confirmation link.
errors.accountPending: Your account is waiting for approval by an administrator.
errors.accountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Contact the administrator.
errors.resetEmailFailed: Failed to send email. Please try again.
errors.updatePasswordFailed: Could not update password. Please try again.
errors.wrongTenant: You don't belong to this organization.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create your first project to upload PDFs and set markers.

emptyInactive.title: No more projects
emptyInactive.description: There are no projects you could join.

leaveConfirm.title: Leave project?
leaveConfirm.description: You will be removed from "{name}" and lose access to its drawings.

removeConfirm.title: Remove member?
removeConfirm.description: "{name}" will be removed from the project and lose access.

create.title: Create new project
create.description: Give your project a name and an optional description.

edit.title: Edit project
edit.description: Change the name or description of the project.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.description: Invite a user to the project "{projectName}".

archiveConfirm.title: Archive project?
archiveConfirm.description: "{name}" will be archived. All PDFs and markers are preserved, but the project will be hidden from the overview.

validation.nameRequired: Project name must not be empty
validation.nameMaxLength: Project name must not exceed 100 characters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

drawings.title: Drawings
drawings.ariaUploadFull: Upload PDF file via drag and drop or click
drawings.notFoundDescription: This project does not exist or you don't have access.
drawings.archivedDrawingDescription: "{name}" has been archived and cannot be displayed in the viewer. You can find it in the archive tab of the project.
drawings.pdfCorruptDescription: The file may be corrupted or in an unsupported format.
drawings.archivedVersionBanner: Archived version — this version has been archived and is no longer the current version.
drawings.editModeHint: Edit mode — Click on the drawing to place a marker. Right-click on markers to edit.

rename.title: Rename drawing
rename.description: Change the display name of the drawing. The filename in storage remains unchanged.
rename.label: Display name

archiveConfirm.title: Archive drawing?
archiveConfirm.description: The drawing "{name}" will be archived and no longer visible in the active list. The file is preserved in storage and cannot be deleted.

create.title: Create new group
create.description: Enter a name for the new drawing group.
create.label: Group name
create.duplicateError: A group with this name already exists.

rename.title: Rename group
rename.description: Enter a new name for the group.

archiveConfirm.title: Archive group "{name}"?
archiveConfirm.descriptionPermanent: The group cannot be restored later.
archiveConfirm.descriptionEmpty: The empty group will be archived and removed from the overview.

upload.title: Upload new version
upload.description: Upload a new PDF version for "{name}". The current version is preserved and markers are automatically carried over.

rename.title: Rename version v{number}
rename.description: Enter a new label for this version.
rename.label: Label

toasts.versionUploadedWithMarkers: New version uploaded, {count} markers carried over
toasts.versionUploadedMarkersWarning: Version created, markers could not be carried over.

validation.fileSizeInteger: File size must be an integer

markers.targetDeletedNavError: Target document was deleted. Please relink the marker.

create.title: New Marker
create.description: Place a marker that links to another drawing.

pending.title: Pending Approvals
pending.subtitle: New registrations awaiting approval
pending.approveDescription: {name} will be activated and can log in immediately.
pending.rejectDescription: The registration of {name} will be rejected. The account will be deactivated.

createUser.title: Add user
createUser.description: Creates a new user with immediate access (no email confirmation required).

detail.editProfileDescription: Change the user's name and email address.
detail.roleHint: User: Full access. Viewer: Read-only, sees all projects. Guest: Read-only, sees only assigned projects.
detail.selfProtection: You cannot deactivate or delete your own account.
detail.creator: Creator
detail.disableDescription: {name} will no longer be able to log in after deactivation. Data is preserved.
detail.removeProjectDescription: {name} will be removed from the project "{project}".
detail.ownerWarning: Warning: This user is the project creator!
detail.deleteDescription: {name} will be permanently marked as deleted. The user can no longer log in.
detail.deleteFinalDescription: This action cannot be undone. {name} will be permanently blocked.
detail.exportDataDescription: Download all personal data of this user as JSON (GDPR Art. 20).
detail.deleteAccountDescription: {name} will be permanently deactivated. Project memberships will be removed.
detail.deleteAccountOwnerError: User must first transfer ownership of these projects:

tenant.gdprDescription: Tenant-wide data export and deletion per GDPR
tenant.exportAllDescription: Exports all data of all users, projects, and drawings of this tenant as JSON (Art. 20 GDPR).
tenant.deleteTenantDescription: Deactivates the entire tenant. All users will lose access. Data remains archived.
tenant.deleteConfirmDescription: All users will be deactivated and the tenant will be locked. This can only be reversed by a platform administrator.

statuses.title: Drawing Statuses
statuses.subtitle: Manage status options for drawings
statuses.name: Name
statuses.emptyDescription: Create status options that can be assigned to drawings.
statuses.deleteDescription: Drawings with this status will be reset to "No status".
statuses.hint: Changes to name or color apply retroactively to all previously assigned statuses.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage all projects in your team and permanently delete them when needed.
projects.showArchivedAria: Show archived projects in the list

empty.title: No projects
empty.description: Your team currently has no active projects.
empty.descriptionWithArchived: Your team currently has no projects.

meta.drawings: {count, plural, =0 {No drawings} one {# drawing} other {# drawings}}
meta.versions: {count, plural, =0 {No versions} one {# version} other {# versions}}
meta.members: {count, plural, =0 {No members} one {# member} other {# members}}
meta.groups: {count, plural, =0 {No groups} one {# group} other {# groups}}

delete.title: Permanently delete project?
delete.srDescription: Confirm the deletion by typing the project name.
delete.irreversible: This action cannot be undone. All data will be permanently lost.
delete.confirmLabel: Type the project name to confirm

counts.drawings: {count, plural, =0 {No drawings} one {# drawing} other {# drawings}}
counts.versions: {count, plural, =0 {No versions} one {# version} other {# versions}}
counts.members: {count, plural, =0 {No memberships} one {# membership} other {# memberships}}
counts.groups: {count, plural, =0 {No groups} one {# group} other {# groups}}

limits.storageExceeded: Storage limit reached. Please upgrade your plan.
limits.fileTooLarge: The file is too large. Maximum file size: {max}.
limits.projectLimitReached: Project limit reached. Please upgrade your plan.
limits.userLimitReached: User limit reached. Please upgrade your plan.

notFound.heading: Organization not found
notFound.description: The requested address could not be assigned to any organization. Please check the URL or contact your administrator.

hero.title: Link plans. Navigate faster.
hero.subtitle: Link2Plan connects technical PDF plans with intelligent markers. Your team navigates between floor plans, sections, and details with a single click — no more searching.

features.title: Everything your team needs
features.subtitle: Manage technical plan documents centrally and link them intelligently.

pdfViewer.title: PDF Viewer in browser
pdfViewer.description: Upload technical plans and view them directly in the browser — no external software needed.

markers.title: Intelligent markers
markers.description: Place markers on PDFs that act as clickable links to other plans. With hover preview.

navigation.title: Navigation history
navigation.description: Jump between linked documents with a click and return to your starting point at any time.

teams.title: Team collaboration
teams.description: Create projects, invite team members, and work together on plan documents.

versioning.title: PDF versioning
versioning.description: Upload new versions — markers are automatically carried over. Old versions are preserved.

archive.title: Archiving system
archive.description: Archive completed projects and drawings. Nothing is lost, the overview stays clean.

pricing.title: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free and grow with your team.

cta.title: Ready to link your plans?
cta.subtitle: Start for free today — no credit card required.

billing.checkoutSuccess: Payment successful! Your plan has been updated.

createTenant.title: Create new tenant
createTenant.description: Create a new organization with an initial administrator.
createTenant.tenantSectionDescription: Name and identifier of the organization.
createTenant.adminSectionDescription: First admin user for this organization.

tenantDetail.editDescription: Change name, identifier, plan and status.
tenantDetail.deactivateDescription: "{name}" will be deactivated. All users will lose access.

cookie.message: This website only uses technically necessary cookies for authentication and language settings.

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.empty: No activity in this project yet.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Account settings
profile.emailReadonly: Can only be changed by an administrator
profile.dataSectionDescription: Information about your rights under GDPR
profile.dataAdminHint: For data export (Art. 20 GDPR), account deletion (Art. 17 GDPR), or access requests (Art. 15 GDPR), please contact your administrator.

sync.offlineWriteBlocked: Not available — please connect to the internet
